diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -3,8 +3,26 @@
 import torch.nn as nn

 import timm

 

+class GradientReverseFunction(torch.autograd.Function):

+    @staticmethod

+    def forward(ctx, input, coeff):

+        ctx.coeff = coeff

+        return input

+

+    @staticmethod

+    def backward(ctx, grad_output):

+        return grad_output.neg() * ctx.coeff, None

+

+class GradientReverseLayer(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, coeff):

+        super(GradientReverseLayer, self).__init__()

+        self.coeff = coeff

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        return GradientReverseFunction.apply(x, self.coeff)

+

 class WildlifeClassifier(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_classes=10, pretrained=True):

+    def __init__(self, num_classes=10, num_domains=3, pretrained=True):

         super().__init__()

         # Using CLIP ViT-B/16 as backbone

         self.backbone = timm.create_model(

@@ -19,6 +37,21 @@
         # Classification head

         self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.feature_dim, num_classes)

         

-    def forward(self, x):

+        # Domain classifier for domain adversarial training

+        self.domain_classifier = nn.Sequential(

+            GradientReverseLayer(coeff=1.0),

+            nn.Linear(self.feature_dim, 512),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.5),

+            nn.Linear(512, num_domains)

+        )

+        

+    def forward(self, x, domain_adapt=False):

         features = self.backbone(x)

-        return self.classifier(features)

+        class_output = self.classifier(features)

+        

+        if domain_adapt:

+            domain_output = self.domain_classifier(features)

+            return class_output, domain_output

+        else:

+            return class_output
